  "claims": [
    "Recent elections have shown the necessity for quick and accurate reporting of results.",
    "AB 16 empowers election officials to start processing ballots earlier, freeing up resources.",
    "Processing vote-by-mail ballots earlier will help restore trust in the election process.",
